stories.title: Fix admin /activity returning 500 Internal Server Error
stories.description: GET /activity on the admin panel returns raw 'Internal Server Error'. Check src/worker/admin/activity.ts — likely a D1 query failure (missing table or column) or unhandled exception. The error happens before the admin layout renders. Add try/catch around the D1 query, return a friendly error page if the query fails. GitHub #415.

stories.title: Fix admin /studio returning 500 Internal Server Error
stories.description: GET /studio on the admin panel returns raw 'Internal Server Error'. Check src/worker/admin/app.ts lines 224-230 — the studio route tries to proxy/serve Sanity Studio. Likely fails because SANITY_PROJECT_ID or SANITY_DEPLOY_TOKEN is not configured in preview env, or the Studio build assets don't exist. Add try/catch, check for required env vars, return informative error if not configured. GitHub #416.

stories.title: Fix admin /gdpr returning 404
stories.description: GET /gdpr on the admin panel returns 404 despite admin.route('/gdpr', gdprAdmin) being registered in app.ts line 251. Check src/worker/admin/gdpr.ts — the sub-router may only have POST handlers and no GET handler for the index route. Add a GET / handler that renders the GDPR admin page (subscriber data management, consent logs, purge controls). GitHub #417.
stories.note: Agent timed out during verification but implementation is complete — GET /gdpr handler + 2 tests added
